content:
🌟 tray-rain | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a quick, at-a-glance view of local weather conditions, specifically temperature and the probability of rain, directly from their Windows system tray without needing to open a full application.
✨ Key Features: • Displays current temperature in system tray • Indicates expected rain for the day • Map-based location picker • Configurable settings (timezone, refresh interval, rain threshold)
📖 Summary: Tray Rain is a small, amateur Windows desktop application that displays the current temperature and the likelihood of rain for the day directly from the system tray. It allows users to select their location using a map-based picker and configures settings like timezone and update intervals via a JSON file.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
